push_prompt.title: Stay Informed
push_prompt.desc: Get instant alerts for order updates, seller approvals, and more — even when you're away from Syano.

about.seo_desc: Learn about Syano — Aleppo's first and most trusted online marketplace. Our mission, values, and team.
about.hero_desc: Syano was born in Aleppo with a simple mission: connect trusted local sellers with buyers across Syria through a modern, transparent platform.
about.mission_p1: We believe every Syrian entrepreneur deserves a world-class platform to showcase their products and grow their business. Syano levels the playing field — giving small sellers in Aleppo the same reach and tools as large businesses.
about.mission_p2: Our platform is built with three principles: radical transparency in fees and policies, lightning-fast delivery, and a buyer protection system that gives every customer peace of mind.
about.value_trust_desc: Every seller is verified. Every product is reviewed. You buy with confidence, every time.
about.value_delivery_desc: From Aleppo to every governorate in Syria — we're building the logistics network Syria deserves.
about.value_quality_desc: Sellers who list on Syano agree to our quality standards. We remove listings that don't meet the bar.
about.value_community_desc: Syano is Syrian, built by Syrians, for Syrians. Every purchase supports a local family or business.
about.value_speed_desc: Order in seconds, track in real-time, and receive at your door — no complexity, no hidden steps.

story.seo_desc: The journey of Syano — from a small idea in Aleppo to Syria's leading online marketplace.
story.hero_desc: The story of how a small team with a big dream built Syria's first comprehensive online marketplace.
story.intro_p1: Syano started as a conversation between friends in Aleppo who were tired of unreliable social media shops with no buyer protection, no tracking, and no accountability. They believed Syria's entrepreneurs deserved better.
story.intro_p2: What began as a weekend project grew into a full-scale marketplace platform, handling thousands of orders monthly and empowering hundreds of sellers across the country.
story.ev1_desc: Three developers in Aleppo sketch the first wireframes for an e-commerce platform built specifically for the Syrian market.
story.ev2_desc: Syano v1 launches with 12 founding sellers. The first 100 orders are processed within the first two weeks.
story.ev3_desc: We introduce the seller verification program, seller center, and commission structure — creating a fair and transparent marketplace.
story.ev4_desc: Syano expands shipping to all 14 Syrian governorates. Order volume grows 5x year-over-year.
story.ev5_desc: Launch of the Syano mobile app. 500+ active sellers, 50,000+ customers, and a team of 20+ people dedicated to making Syano the best marketplace in the region.
story.vision_desc: We're building toward a future where any Syrian — from Damascus to Deir ez-Zor — can find what they need, delivered reliably, from a seller they trust. That's not just a marketplace. It's a foundation for economic recovery.

team.seo_desc: Meet the people behind Syano — the team building Syria's most trusted online marketplace.
team.hero_desc: A passionate group of engineers, designers, and operations specialists committed to building the best marketplace in Syria.
team.m1_bio: Ahmad leads Syano's vision and strategy. Born and raised in Aleppo, he's passionate about using technology to rebuild Syria's economy.
team.m2_bio: Khalid architects the platform and leads the engineering team. He built Syano's first version over a single long weekend.
team.m3_bio: Lara owns the product roadmap and ensures every feature solves a real problem for buyers and sellers alike.
team.m4_bio: Rami manages seller onboarding, logistics partnerships, and quality control across all 14 governorates.
team.m5_bio: Sara builds Syano's brand and grows our community of buyers and sellers across Syria and the diaspora.
team.m6_bio: Yousef crafts the visual identity and user experience of Syano, ensuring it's accessible and beautiful for all users.
team.join_desc: We're always looking for passionate people who want to make a difference. If you believe in our mission, we want to hear from you.

contact.seo_desc: Get in touch with the Syano team — we're here to help buyers, sellers, and partners.
contact.hero_desc: Have a question, a problem to report, or a partnership opportunity? Our team is ready to respond within 24 hours.
contact.seller_support_desc: Are you a seller or looking to join Syano? Contact our dedicated seller support team for faster assistance.
contact.placeholder_message: Tell us how we can help you...
contact.success_desc: Thank you for reaching out. We'll get back to you within 24 hours.
contact.err_name: Name must be at least 2 characters
contact.err_email: Please enter a valid email address
contact.err_message: Message must be at least 10 characters
contact.err_network: Failed to send. Please try again.

how_to_sell.seo_desc: A complete guide to selling on Syano — from application to your first sale and beyond.
how_to_sell.hero_desc: Everything you need to know to list products, manage orders, and grow your business on Syria's top marketplace.
how_to_sell.step1_desc: Submit a seller application with your store details. Our team reviews applications within 24–48 hours.
how_to_sell.step1_d1: Fill out the seller application form with your store name, category, and city
how_to_sell.step1_d2: Our team reviews your application and verifies your business
how_to_sell.step1_d3: Once approved, you get full access to the Seller Dashboard
how_to_sell.step2_desc: Add products with clear photos, detailed descriptions, and competitive pricing.
how_to_sell.step2_d1: Add products with name, price, stock count, and description
how_to_sell.step2_d2: Choose the right category so buyers can find your products
how_to_sell.step2_d3: Set discounts and manage inventory from your dashboard
how_to_sell.step3_desc: When a customer places an order, you get notified immediately and can manage it from your Seller Orders page.
how_to_sell.step3_d1: Get real-time notifications for every new order
how_to_sell.step3_d2: Contact the customer to arrange delivery and confirm details
how_to_sell.step3_d3: Update order status as you process, ship, and deliver
how_to_sell.step4_desc: Payments are processed after successful delivery. Syano takes a small commission and transfers the rest to you.
how_to_sell.step4_d1: Commission rates range from 3% to 10% depending on category
how_to_sell.step4_d2: Earnings are settled on a weekly basis
how_to_sell.step4_d3: Transparent breakdown of each sale in your dashboard
how_to_sell.cta_desc: Join hundreds of verified sellers on Syano and reach customers across Syria.

seller_terms.seo_desc: Terms and conditions for sellers on Syano marketplace.
seller_terms.intro: These Seller Terms of Service govern your use of the Syano marketplace as a seller. By registering as a seller, you agree to these terms in full.
seller_terms.eligibility_body: To sell on Syano, you must be at least 18 years of age, have a valid Syrian phone number, and operate within the laws of the Syrian Arab Republic. We reserve the right to reject any application at our sole discretion.
seller_terms.account_body: You are responsible for maintaining the security of your seller account credentials. You may not transfer your account to another person. All activity under your account is your responsibility.
seller_terms.listings_body: All product listings must be accurate, complete, and not misleading. You may not list counterfeit goods, prohibited items, or products you do not have the right to sell. Syano reserves the right to remove any listing at any time.
seller_terms.orders_body: Upon receiving an order, you must contact the buyer within 24 hours to arrange delivery. You must fulfill orders promptly and accurately. Repeated cancellations or failure to fulfill orders may result in account suspension.
seller_terms.payments_body: Syano deducts a commission from each completed sale as specified in our Commission Rates page. Remaining earnings are transferred to you on a weekly basis. Syano is not responsible for delays caused by banking systems.
seller_terms.prohibited_body: You may not sell: weapons or explosives, drugs or controlled substances, counterfeit or replica goods, items that infringe intellectual property rights, adult content, or any items prohibited under Syrian law.
seller_terms.termination_body: Syano may suspend or terminate your seller account for violations of these terms, repeated poor performance, or any activity that harms buyers or the platform. You may appeal termination decisions by contacting our support team.
seller_terms.changes_body: We may update these terms from time to time. Continued use of the platform after changes constitutes acceptance of the new terms. We will notify active sellers of significant changes via email.

seller_center.seo_desc: Your hub for everything you need to succeed as a Syano seller.
seller_center.hero_desc: Everything you need to grow your business on Syano — guides, tools, policies, and support all in one place.
seller_center.res_how_desc: Step-by-step guide from application to your first delivery.
seller_center.res_commission_desc: Transparent fee structure by product category.
seller_center.res_terms_desc: Your rights and responsibilities as a Syano seller.
seller_center.res_faq_desc: Answers to the most common seller questions.
seller_center.res_dashboard_desc: Manage your products, orders, and inventory.
seller_center.cta_desc: Join hundreds of verified sellers across Syria. The application takes less than 5 minutes.

commission.seo_desc: Syano's transparent commission structure — know exactly what you earn from every sale.
commission.hero_desc: Simple, transparent, and competitive. Know exactly what you earn before you list.
commission.how_it_works: Syano charges a flat commission on each completed sale. The commission is deducted from the sale price, and the remainder is transferred to your account weekly. There are no listing fees, no monthly subscriptions, and no hidden charges.
commission.calc_desc: Here's how commission works for an Electronics sale at 5%:

seller_faq.seo_desc: Answers to the most common questions from Syano sellers.
seller_faq.hero_desc: Can't find what you need? Browse our most frequently asked seller questions below.
seller_faq.q1: How do I apply to become a seller?
seller_faq.a1: Click 'Join as a Seller' in the footer or visit /register. Select 'Sell products', fill in your store details, and submit the form. Our team reviews applications within 24–48 hours.
seller_faq.q2: How long does the approval process take?
seller_faq.a2: Most applications are reviewed within 24–48 business hours. Complex applications or those requiring additional verification may take up to 5 business days.
seller_faq.a3: Commission ranges from 3% to 10% depending on the product category. There are no listing fees or monthly subscription charges. Visit our Commission Rates page for a full breakdown.
seller_faq.q4: How and when do I get paid?
seller_faq.a4: Earnings from completed orders are settled weekly. The commission is deducted and the remainder is transferred to your registered bank account or mobile wallet.
seller_faq.q5: Can I list products from multiple categories?
seller_faq.a5: Yes. Once approved, you can list products in any category. Your store profile shows your primary category, but you can sell across all categories.
seller_faq.q6: What happens if a customer wants to return a product?
seller_faq.a6: Customers have 30 days to return eligible products. You will be notified of a return request and must coordinate the pickup or drop-off. Returns policy details are on our Returns Policy page.
seller_faq.q7: How do I update product prices or stock?
seller_faq.a7: Log into your Seller Dashboard, go to Inventory & Pricing, and edit any product's price, stock count, or discount directly from the table.
seller_faq.q8: What are the prohibited items I cannot sell?
seller_faq.a8: You cannot sell weapons, drugs, counterfeit goods, items infringing intellectual property, adult content, or anything prohibited under Syrian law. See the Seller Terms for the full list.
seller_faq.a9: Yes. In the Inventory section, you can set a percentage discount per product. The discounted price is shown to buyers automatically.
seller_faq.q10: What if I receive a fake or fraudulent order?
seller_faq.a10: Contact our seller support team at sellers@syano.online immediately. We investigate all reports of fraudulent activity and take action to protect our sellers.
seller_faq.a11: Accounts can be suspended for violating our Seller Terms, repeated failure to fulfill orders, high cancellation rates, or selling prohibited items. You can appeal suspensions by contacting support.
seller_faq.q12: How do I close my seller account?
seller_faq.a12: Contact sellers@syano.online to request account closure. All pending orders must be fulfilled before the account can be closed.
seller_faq.contact_desc: Our seller support team is available every day to help you succeed on Syano.

shipping.seo_desc: Everything about shipping on Syano — delivery zones, costs, and timelines.
shipping.hero_desc: Fast, reliable delivery from Aleppo to your doorstep. Here's everything you need to know about how we ship.
shipping.feat1_desc: Orders placed before 2 PM are eligible for same-day delivery within Aleppo city limits.
shipping.feat2_desc: We ship to all 14 Syrian governorates. Remote areas may take slightly longer.
shipping.feat3_desc: Every order is tracked. Monitor your delivery status in real-time from your Order History page.
shipping.feat4_desc: Pay when your order arrives. No upfront online payment required.
shipping.how_step1: Place your order and provide your full address and phone number.
shipping.how_step2: The seller receives your order and contacts you within 24 hours to confirm delivery details.
shipping.how_step3: Your order is prepared and dispatched. You can track its status in your Order History.
shipping.how_step4: Our delivery partner arrives at your address. Pay cash on delivery and enjoy your purchase!
shipping.nationwide_cta_desc: View our complete nationwide coverage map and rates.

nationwide.seo_desc: Syano delivers to all 14 Syrian governorates. View coverage and rates.
nationwide.hero_desc: From Aleppo to every corner of Syria — our delivery network covers all 14 governorates.
nationwide.note1: Delivery times are estimates and may vary due to road conditions, weather, or public holidays.
nationwide.note2: Cash on delivery is the standard payment method for all shipments.
nationwide.note3: Large or heavy items may incur additional shipping charges. This will be shown clearly at checkout.
nationwide.note4: If you are not available to receive your order, the delivery partner will contact you to reschedule.

payment_methods.seo_desc: Learn about accepted payment methods on Syano marketplace.
payment_methods.hero_desc: We offer flexible payment options designed for the Syrian market, with more on the way.
payment_methods.method1_desc: Pay in cash when your order arrives at your door. No credit card, no bank account needed. The most popular payment method on Syano.
payment_methods.method2_desc: Visa, Mastercard, and Syrian bank cards. Secure online payment with full encryption. Launching soon.
payment_methods.method3_desc: Pay via popular Syrian mobile wallets and digital payment apps. Integration in progress.
payment_methods.security_desc: All payment data is encrypted using industry-standard TLS encryption. Syano never stores your card details. Cash on delivery means there is no financial risk until you inspect your order at the door.

guarantee.seo_desc: Shop with confidence — Syano protects every purchase you make on our marketplace.
guarantee.hero_desc: Every purchase on Syano is protected. We stand behind every seller and every product on our platform.
guarantee.pillar1_desc: If your order doesn't arrive or doesn't match the description, we will resolve it — with a refund or replacement.
guarantee.pillar2_desc: 30-day return window on eligible items. No arguments, no run-around. Just a fair and simple process.
guarantee.pillar3_desc: Our support team is available every day to mediate disputes, answer questions, and ensure a fair outcome.
guarantee.pillar4_desc: Every seller on Syano is manually reviewed and verified before they can list products. No anonymous shops.
guarantee.protect1: Items that never arrive after payment
guarantee.protect2: Products that significantly differ from their description or photos
guarantee.protect3: Defective or damaged items on arrival
guarantee.protect6: Sellers who become unresponsive after an order is placed

loyalty.seo_desc: Earn rewards every time you shop on Syano. Discover our loyalty program tiers and benefits.
loyalty.hero_desc: Every purchase earns you points. Redeem them for discounts, free shipping, and exclusive perks.
loyalty.tier1_p2: Access to flash sale early notifications
loyalty.tier2_p2: Free standard shipping on every order
loyalty.tier3_p3: VIP access to new seller launches
loyalty.how1_desc: You earn points automatically with every completed purchase. The more you spend, the faster you level up.
loyalty.how2_desc: Reach 100 points to unlock Gold, 500 for Platinum. Your tier resets annually based on the prior 12 months.
loyalty.how3_desc: Use your points at checkout for discounts. 10 points = $1 off your order.
loyalty.how4_desc: Higher tiers unlock free shipping, priority support, and access to members-only deals not available to the public.

help.seo_desc: Find answers to common questions about orders, payments, shipping, and more on Syano.
help.no_results_desc: Try a different keyword or browse the categories above.
help.orders_q1: How do I track my order?
help.orders_a1: Log in and go to 'Order History'. Click on any order to see its current status and delivery details. The seller will also contact you directly to confirm delivery.
help.orders_a2: You can cancel an order while it is in 'Pending' status. Open the order from Order History and click 'Cancel Order'. Once processing begins, cancellations must be arranged with the seller.
help.orders_q3: My order shows 'Delivered' but I haven't received it. What do I do?
help.orders_a3: Contact the seller directly via the phone number on your order. If you can't reach them, contact our support team at hello@syano.online and we will mediate.
help.orders_a4: Aleppo city orders: 1 business day. Nearby governorates: 2–4 days. All other governorates: 4–7 days. Times may vary during public holidays.
help.orders_q5: Can I change my delivery address after placing an order?
help.orders_a5: Contact the seller as soon as possible to request an address change. If the order hasn't been dispatched yet, the seller can update the address.
help.payments_a1: Cash on Delivery (COD) is currently the primary payment method. Card and mobile wallet payments are coming soon.
help.payments_a2: You pay in cash when your order arrives at your door. You do not need to pay anything upfront.
help.payments_a3: Yes. If your item is eligible for return, you will receive a full refund of the purchase price. Refunds are processed within 5–7 business days after the return is confirmed.
help.payments_a4: Since we primarily use Cash on Delivery, your financial data is never stored on our servers. All online data is encrypted with TLS.
help.shipping_q1: How is the delivery fee calculated?
help.shipping_a1: Delivery fees depend on your governorate. Aleppo city orders over $20 are free. Other zones range from $2–$5. The exact fee is shown at checkout.
help.shipping_q2: Do you ship to all of Syria?
help.shipping_a2: Yes. We deliver to all 14 Syrian governorates. Visit our Nationwide Shipping page for a full list of covered areas.
help.shipping_q3: What if I'm not home when the delivery arrives?
help.shipping_a3: The delivery person will call you on the phone number provided during checkout. You can arrange a new delivery time or have someone else receive the order on your behalf.
help.shipping_q4: Can I schedule a delivery for a specific time?
help.shipping_a4: You can request a preferred delivery window in the 'Delivery Notes' field at checkout. The seller will do their best to accommodate your request.
help.returns_q1: How do I return an item?
help.returns_a1: Contact the seller within 30 days of delivery via the Order History page. The seller will arrange for pickup or ask you to drop off the item. Keep the original packaging if possible.
help.returns_a2: Most items are returnable within 30 days. Non-returnable items include perishable food, digital products, intimate apparel, and custom-made items.
help.returns_q3: How long does a refund take?
help.returns_a3: Once the return is confirmed and the seller receives the item, refunds are processed within 5–7 business days.
help.returns_q4: What if the item I received is damaged?
help.returns_a4: Take photos of the damaged item and contact our support team at hello@syano.online immediately. We will mediate to ensure you get a replacement or full refund.
help.account_q1: How do I change my password?
help.account_a1: Go to your profile settings and select 'Change Password'. Enter your current password, then your new password twice to confirm.
help.account_q2: How do I delete my account?
help.account_a2: Contact our support team at hello@syano.online to request account deletion. Note that this action is permanent and cannot be undone.
help.account_q3: I forgot my password. How do I reset it?
help.account_a3: On the login page, click 'Forgot Password' and enter your email. You will receive a reset link within a few minutes.
help.account_q4: How do I update my contact information?
help.account_a4: Log in and go to your Customer Dashboard. From there you can update your profile information, phone number, and delivery address.
help.seller_q1: How do I become a seller?
help.seller_a1: Click 'Join as a Seller' in the footer and fill out the seller application. Our team reviews applications within 24–48 hours.
help.seller_a2: Commission ranges from 3% to 10% depending on the product category. There are no other fees. Visit the Commission Rates page for details.
help.seller_q3: How do I manage my products?
help.seller_a3: Access your Seller Dashboard to add, edit, or remove products. Use the Inventory section to manage stock levels and pricing.
help.seller_q4: How do I contact seller support?
help.seller_a4: Dedicated seller support is available at sellers@syano.online. We respond to all seller inquiries within 12 hours.

privacy.seo_desc: Syano's privacy policy — how we collect, use, and protect your personal data.
privacy.intro: This Privacy Policy explains how Syano collects, uses, and protects your personal information when you use our marketplace. By using Syano, you agree to this policy.
privacy.collection_body:
We collect information you provide directly: your name, email address, phone number, and delivery address when you register or place an order.

We also collect automatically: your device type, browser, IP address, pages visited, and actions taken on our platform. This helps us improve the service.
privacy.use_body: We use your data to process orders and deliver them to you, communicate about your account and orders, improve our platform and services, send you relevant offers (with your consent), and comply with legal obligations.
privacy.sharing_body:
We share your contact information with sellers only to the extent necessary to fulfill your order (e.g., name and phone number for delivery coordination).

We do not sell your data to third parties. We may share data with service providers who help us operate the platform, under strict confidentiality agreements.
privacy.cookies_body: We use cookies to keep you logged in, remember your preferences, and analyze platform usage. You can control cookies through your browser settings. Disabling cookies may affect some features.
privacy.security_body: We use industry-standard encryption (TLS) to protect data in transit. Our servers are secured with access controls, and we conduct regular security reviews. No system is 100% secure, and we cannot guarantee absolute security.
privacy.retention_body: We retain your account data as long as your account is active. Order history is retained for 7 years for legal and tax purposes. You may request deletion of your account at any time.
privacy.rights_body: You have the right to access your personal data, correct inaccurate information, request deletion of your account, and withdraw consent for marketing communications. Contact us at hello@syano.online to exercise these rights.
privacy.contact_body:
For privacy-related questions or requests, contact us at:

Email: privacy@syano.online
Address: Aleppo, Syrian Arab Republic

terms_of_use.seo_desc: Syano's terms of use — the rules governing your use of our marketplace.
terms_of_use.intro: These Terms of Use govern your use of the Syano marketplace. By accessing or using our platform, you agree to these terms. If you disagree, please do not use Syano.
terms_of_use.acceptance_body: By creating an account or using Syano, you confirm that you are at least 18 years of age and have the legal capacity to enter into a binding agreement. Use of the platform by minors is prohibited.
terms_of_use.account_body: You are responsible for keeping your account credentials secure. You may not share your account or allow others to use it. You must provide accurate information when registering and keep it up to date.
terms_of_use.conduct_body: You may not use Syano to: post false or misleading information, harass other users or sellers, attempt to circumvent our systems, engage in fraudulent transactions, scrape or copy platform data without permission, or violate any applicable law.
terms_of_use.products_body: Syano is a marketplace connecting buyers and sellers. We do not manufacture or sell products directly. All transactions are between buyers and sellers. Syano facilitates the transaction but is not a party to it.
terms_of_use.payments_body: Payments are currently processed via Cash on Delivery. Syano is not responsible for any financial losses arising from unauthorized use of your account. You agree to pay for all orders you place.
terms_of_use.ip_body: All content on the Syano platform — including logos, design, code, and copy — is the property of Syano and protected by copyright. You may not reproduce or distribute our content without written permission.
terms_of_use.disclaimer_body: Syano is provided 'as is' without warranties of any kind. We do not guarantee uninterrupted service, error-free operation, or the accuracy of all product listings. Use the platform at your own risk.
terms_of_use.governing_body: These terms are governed by the laws of the Syrian Arab Republic. Any disputes shall be resolved in the courts of Aleppo, Syria, unless otherwise required by applicable law.

returns.seo_desc: Syano's 30-day returns policy — how to return items and get your refund.
returns.hero_desc: 30-day returns on eligible items. Simple, fair, and hassle-free.
returns.returnable1: Items in original, unused condition with packaging intact
returns.returnable2: Defective or damaged products received on delivery
returns.returnable3: Products that significantly differ from their listed description
returns.returnable4: Wrong items delivered by the seller
returns.returnable5: Electronics that fail to function as described within 30 days
returns.non_returnable3: Intimate apparel and personal hygiene products
returns.eligibility_body: Items can be returned within 30 days of delivery. The item must be in its original, unused condition with all original packaging. Items showing signs of use beyond normal inspection are not eligible for return.
returns.process_body:
1. Contact the seller via your Order History page within 30 days of delivery.
2. Explain the reason for the return and provide photos if applicable.
3. The seller will arrange pickup or provide a drop-off address.
4. Once the seller confirms receipt of the returned item, your refund is processed.
returns.refunds_body: Refunds are processed within 5–7 business days after the seller confirms receipt of the return. Since Syano uses Cash on Delivery, refunds are typically arranged directly with the seller. If the seller is unresponsive, contact hello@syano.online for mediation.
returns.non_returnable_body: The following items cannot be returned under any circumstances: perishable food and grocery products, digital products and downloads, intimate apparel and personal hygiene items, and custom-made or personalized items.
returns.damaged_body: If you receive a damaged or defective item, photograph it immediately and contact hello@syano.online within 48 hours of delivery. We will mediate to ensure you receive a replacement or full refund at no additional cost.
returns.contact_body:
For returns assistance, contact:

Email: hello@syano.online
Seller Support: sellers@syano.online

Our support team responds within 24 hours.

cookies.seo_desc: How Syano uses cookies and similar technologies on our marketplace.
cookies.intro: This Cookie Policy explains how Syano uses cookies and similar tracking technologies when you use our platform. By using Syano, you consent to our use of cookies as described here.
cookies.what_body: Cookies are small text files placed on your device by websites you visit. They are widely used to make websites work more efficiently and to provide information to the site owners. Cookies do not contain executable code and cannot carry viruses.
cookies.types_body:
Essential cookies: Required for the platform to function (login sessions, cart contents, language preference). These cannot be disabled.

Analytics cookies: Help us understand how visitors use the platform so we can improve it. These are anonymized and aggregated.

Preference cookies: Remember your settings and preferences across visits, such as your selected currency or language.
cookies.use_body: We use cookies to keep you logged into your account across page loads, remember items in your shopping cart, save your language and currency preferences, analyze traffic patterns and popular pages, and prevent fraudulent activity.
cookies.control_body:
You can control and delete cookies through your browser settings. Most browsers allow you to refuse cookies or delete them at any time. Note that disabling essential cookies will prevent you from logging in or using the cart.

For detailed browser instructions, visit your browser's help documentation.
cookies.updates_body: We may update this Cookie Policy from time to time to reflect changes in technology or legal requirements. The 'Last updated' date at the top shows when the policy was last revised. Continued use of Syano after changes constitutes acceptance.
cookies.contact_body:
For questions about our use of cookies:

Email: privacy@syano.online
Address: Aleppo, Syrian Arab Republic
